summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: baby-step giant-step discrete log for p=23, g=5, h=7, m=5. BLUE baby boxes g^j for j=0..4, ORANGE giant boxes h(g^(-m))^i for i=0..5. ValueTracker step_tr walks through giant boxes with always_redraw YELLOW scanner; on match, GREEN highlight + arrow to baby + live i, current giant value; found x=im+j.
